### Description

## GYEON - Q²M Silk Dryer EVO - 70x90 cm
QÃ‚Â²M SilkDryer EVO is an updated and improved version of one of the most innovative drying towels. Compared with the version introduced back in 2015, the EVO variant features a higher GSM at 530. The total absorbency is up to 50% higher than before. Reduced edges to an absolute minimum, to make the towel even more functional and safer on complex shaped panels.
